brain_consensus.narrative: Fear has a stranglehold on the market as the Fear & Greed Index plunges to 29, yet beneath the surface, stablecoin reserves are quietly expanding and the MVRV Z-Score signals deeply undervalued conditions. This setup echoes the August 2024 bottom with 79% similarity, where extreme bearish sentiment and rising dry powder preceded a sharp mean-reversion rally. The market feels broken, but the plumbing suggests accumulation.
brain_consensus.headline: Blood in the Streets, Dry Powder Accumulates

next_move.reasoning: Despite the bottom_2024_aug analog, massive ETF flow divergence (+45), fading BTC dominance (+25), and elevated VIX suggest this is not a true bottom-recovery Disbelief but rather anxious chop near resistance; with 0% direction accuracy and repeated HOLD outcomes when I called UP/DOWN, the safest read is a grind upward to Complacency on momentum exhaustion rather than conviction, but I have very low confidence given my track record of missing regime persistence.
